Okay, your foundation set, making sure that you have the culture in place, your values, your mission, and how to plan so that you know what you're actually doing, right? Now we want to talk about communicating so that everyone else in the business understands and knows these things because if you have core tenants, if you have a mission, if you have goals, but nobody understands what they are and how you're working towards them, then you don't have a business. So, communication cycles, right? What I want to communicate to you is that lack of communication leads to fear and doubt, okay? Lack. Unpredictable communication leads to fear and doubt. So lack of communication would be having no communication at all, right? Unpredictable communication means having sporadic, meaning it's not planned, they don't know when to expect it, they don't know when it's coming next, right? And unclear communication leads to fear and doubt, meaning you might be contradicting something you said prior, you might not be specific enough, you might not be measurable, okay? Meaning a communication cycle into our business will take you two hours and save you tens of thousands of dollars lost in mistakes, undiscovered human potential, goals that implement anything else from this entire portal, just put these freaking things in place. And I am saying this because I love all of you and I want you to succeed and there are so many people that, let me tell you this, I stood up in front of a room in front of business owners and they were applauding us for having, at that point, we were at a $30 million run rate. And all of them said, you know, what's the one thing you could tell all of us to do? And they were all so focused on their marketing and sales. And I was like, the only reason I am up here and none of you are is because you're too lazy to put a cadence into place for your business. You're too lazy to focus anything on the operations. And I was like, and then you sit here and tell me that you don't have time and it takes two fucking hours. That is it. And so I say that because I hope I instill a sense of urgency in you that you need to do this and you need to do it right now, whether it means you need to pause after this module and go do it, it literally took me two hours and it's just be the one thing you do.
